title: xyris subuniflora
intro: Xyris subuniflora, also known as the single-flowered yellow-eyed grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Xyris subuniflora is valued for its health benefits, such as treating respiratory issues, including bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
